flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 47% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-San German vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.6k vs 5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-San German fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
